programs.title: Titoo Ki Sacchi Wish-Titoo
programs.desc: Titoo's father tells him that if you make a wish with all your heart, it will come true. S01E03.

programs.title: Sunday Is Funday-Titoo
programs.desc: When they are left home alone on a Sunday, Titoo and Golu decide to clean the house. S01 E04.

programs.title: Liar Liar-Titoo
programs.desc: Titoo makes a promise to his mother to never lie and to only tell the truth at all times. S01E05.

programs.title: Titoo For Tat-Titoo
programs.desc: When Shera makes Rinky-Pinky on her birthday, Titoo decides to teach him a lesson. S01E06.

programs.title: Titoo Ke Tedhe Sawaal-Titoo
programs.desc: Titoo's parents tells him to ask before doing anything but soon get annoyed with his many questions. S01 E07.

programs.title: Geela Home Work-Titoo
programs.desc: When Shera throws water on his homework, Titoo tells Shera's father and gets him punished. S01 E08.
